title: trigonochilum anthoxanthum
intro: Trigonochilum anthoxanthum, also known as the sweet vernal grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm the skin. The health benefits of Trigonochilum anthoxanthum include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as hay fever and asthma, due to its allergen-reducing properties. Trigonochilum anthoxanthum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies for respiratory issues.
